entries.content: adjective (bound to happen) 必然发生的 bìrán fāshēng de ‹consequence, event›; 难以避免的 nányǐ bìmiǎn de ‹disaster›; (predictable) 照例必有的 zhàolì bì yǒu de▸ it was inevitable that he would do that 按照惯例他要做那件事
entries.label: A
entries.name: adjective

entries.content: noun 必然发生的事 bìrán fāshēng de shì▸ the inevitable happened 逃不掉的事情发生了▸ to bow to the inevitable 接受必然发生的事
entries.label: B
entries.name: noun
